title: Special GTA$ Bonuses
headline: Special GTA$ Bonuses
subtitle: Complete a Sell Mission each week for Bonus GTA$
content:
Get a GTA$500,000 bonus by completing a Sell Mission of any type between February 26 – March 4.

Check back to receive an additional GTA$500,000 bonus for completing any Sell Mission between March 5 – 11.

Each GTA$ bonus will be delivered to your Maze Bank account within 72 hours of completion. Use your newfound ill-gotten gains to expand your criminal empire.
